story.soThat: API consumers have up-to-date, interactive API documentation

tasks.task: Commit: "Add OpenAPI 3.0 documentation with Swagger UI"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: OpenApiConfiguration.kt with API metadata (title, version, description)
Widget API fully documented with request/response schemas
"Try it out" functionality works in Swagger UI (with test JWT)
API documentation includes examples and descriptions

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Automatic API documentation generation. OpenAPI 3.0 specification. Swagger UI for interactive exploration.

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: Springdoc OpenAPI 2.6.0. OpenApiConfiguration with metadata. Security scheme (Bearer JWT). @Tag, @Operation, @ApiResponse annotations.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Springdoc OpenAPI 2.6.0. OpenApiConfiguration with metadata. Bearer JWT security scheme (placeholder). Swagger UI at /swagger-ui.html. Widget API documented with examples.

constraints.constraint: All REST endpoints must have @Operation annotations
Security scheme configured (Bearer JWT) even if not yet enforced
Examples and descriptions for all DTOs

pattern.name: OpenAPI Configuration Pattern

ideas.idea: Test OpenApiConfiguration bean creates OpenAPI instance
Test API metadata: title="EAF v1.0 API", version="1.0.0"
Test Bearer JWT security scheme configured
Verify security scheme type=HTTP, scheme=bearer, bearerFormat=JWT
Manual: Verify Widget API endpoints visible in Swagger UI
Manual: Test "Try it out" for POST /widgets
Manual: Verify examples in request/response schemas
